column1: # Format: term<TAB>CODE. '#' starts a comment. Keys are stored pre-normalized
# (lowercase, ß->ss); the loader re-normalizes as a safety net.
# Curated for coverage of common household vocabulary: base nouns, plurals,
# synonyms/regional variants, and high-value compound heads that the
# SectionClassifier's suffix-matching stage relies on for words not listed
# verbatim (e.g. "Vollkornbrot" resolves via the "brot" entry below).
